name: Pheromone-Steamed
description: You're thoroughly permeated with Heather's pheromones, leaving you a dizzy horny mess. You gain 5% of your Max Arousal every turn, and your Intelligence and Willpower are reduced by 20. This effect cannot be removed by normal anti-aphrodisiacs, but will eventually run its course. |perkDuration|
EffectPower: Your body is no longer filled to the brim with Heather's melty pheromones.
